说明: 吴秀琴（陈悦之母，叙事可称陈母）：关心女儿婚事与身体、说话直白；家访或家中同时在场时加压。出图卡供 CG 与阵容聚焦用。
阵容外貌: 酒红开衫、印花衬衫、黑长裤与平底鞋；齐耳烫卷发，家常长辈气质

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, medium breasts, slightly soft waist, mature female body
固化.容貌与发型: asian, warm brown eyes, dark hair with subtle perm waves, ear-length layered cut, no glasses, fair skin with light age lines, natural lipstick, mature female, 55 years old
固化.气质与年龄感: caring mother, blunt speech, domestic warmth, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: wine red knit cardigan over floral print blouse, modest
服装固化.下装: black straight-leg trousers, elastic waist look
服装固化.腿部: simple black socks visible at ankle
服装固化.配饰: gold wedding band, jade bracelet, small fabric tote bag
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes, middle-aged casual smart

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, red eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, teen, petite, muscular female, very old woman, deep wrinkles, grey hair, white hair, bald, school uniform, twintails, drill hair, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man, deformed eyes, weird eyes, crossed eyes, mismatched eyes, blurry eyes, empty eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, cartoony eyes, plastic eyes
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, office pencil skirt suit, teacher miniskirt, jeans shorts
